shapes.text: ONE OF THE WORLD’S MOST DYNAMIC MEGACITIES
A GLOBAL CENTER OF TECHNOLOGY, CULTURE, AND FINANCE
LOCATED ON THE EASTERN COAST OF HONSHU ISLAND
MIX OF URBAN LANDSCAPE AND NATURAL SURROUNDINGS
ONE OF THE WORLD’S LARGEST METROPOLITAN ECONOMIES
BLEND OF ANCIENT AND MODERN CULTURE
LEADING CITY IN ROBOTICS AND ELECTRONICS
SYMBOL OF INNOVATION AND TRADITION COMBINED
